# Cosmic Signature

> Cosmic Signature is a procedural on-chain art protocol on Arbitrum. Every gesture shapes the cycle's final Signature, and the protocol redistributes its reserves across more than ten allocation tracks — including the infrastructure Ethereum itself depends on.

## Overview

Cosmic Signature is a procedural on-chain art protocol on Arbitrum. Participants make gestures during a Performance Cycle; when the cycle finalizes, the protocol distributes its reserves across more than ten allocation tracks — including Protocol Guild, the funding mechanism for 170+ Ethereum core contributors. The protocol runs on Arbitrum, a Layer 2 scaling solution for Ethereum, providing fast and low-cost transactions.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/): Live gesture interface and active cycle status
- [Gallery](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/gallery): Browse all imprinted COSMIC NFTs
- [How It Works](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/how-it-works): Complete guide to protocol mechanics
- [FAQ](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Statistics](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/statistics): Protocol statistics and analytics
- [Anchoring](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/anchoring): Anchor COSMIC NFTs to receive Anchor Distributions
- [Allocation](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/allocation): Current Cycle Reserve and allocation tracks
- [Contracts](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/contracts): Smart contract details and addresses
- [Outreach](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/marketing): Outreach allocation program
- [Imprint](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/mint): Imprint new tokens

## Protocol Mechanics

- Each cycle opens with a Calibration Window where Gesture Cost descends over roughly two days
- Every gesture increases the Gesture Cost by ~1% and extends the Cycle Finalization Time by about an hour
- The participant who made the Final Gesture when the Cycle Finalization Time expires may finalize the cycle and receive the Signature Allocation (25% of the Cycle Reserve)
- Every gesture imprints 100 CST tokens and a Stellar Selection entry
- 12 COSMIC NFTs are imprinted per cycle
- Stellar Selection recipients share 6% of the Cycle Reserve
- 7% of each Cycle Reserve is forwarded to Protocol Guild (public goods)
- Participants can make gestures with ETH or CST tokens (CST uses its own Calibration Window)
- RandomWalkNFT holders receive a 50% Gesture-Cost reduction

## Tokens

- **CST (Cosmic Signature Token)**: ERC-20 coordination and utility token
- **COSMIC NFT**: ERC-721 generative art based on three-body problem physics
- **RandomWalkNFT**: Partner NFT offering Gesture-Cost reductions

## Community

- Twitter/X: https://x.com/CosmicSignature
- Discord: https://discord.gg/bGnPn96Qwt

## Technical

- Blockchain: Arbitrum (Ethereum Layer 2)
- Smart contracts: Immutable, open-source, formally verified
- NFT art: Generated from on-chain seeds using an open-source Rust program
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript

- [Full documentation](https://www.cosmicsignature.com/llms-full.txt)
